features.title: Access to Opportunities

faqs.question: What is the JioGames Creator Network?
faqs.answer: JioGames Creator Network is the in-house program for discovering, supporting and working with creators. Members get direct access to campaigns, drops, events and early releases on JioGames.

faqs.question: How do I qualify for the network?
faqs.answer: We look for consistency, quality and genuine love of gaming. Follower count matters less than what you post and how often. Every application is read by our team.

faqs.question: Is this only for gaming creators?
faqs.answer: Yes. The Creator Network is launching as a 'gamer first' program.

faqs.question: Which platforms are eligible?
faqs.answer: All major platforms are ellgible: YouTube, Instagram, X, Twitch, Facebook, Reddit, and Discord. If you consistently create gaming content on any platform, you can apply.

faqs.question: Is this a paid program?
faqs.answer: It’s free to apply and participate. Members gain access to campaigns, drops and collabortation opportunities. Payouts are not part of this phase

faqs.question: Can I join if I’m part of other creator programs?
faqs.answer: Yes. Being part of the Creator Network doesn’t restrict you from working with other platforms or programs. When campaign requires exclusivity, it will be clearly communicated in advance.

faqs.question: What happens if I’m not selected?
faqs.answer: Your application remains active. Some creators are not selected right away but are brought in later based as they growth and stay consistent. Keep creating and Keep applying

faqs.question: Does a referral improve my chances?
faqs.answer: Yes. A referral tells us an existing member is backing you, which carries weight in our review. It does not guarantee selection, but it counts.

steps.title: Apply
steps.description: Submit your details, platforms and format. We only ask we need.

steps.title: Review
steps.description: We score for quality, consistency and fit, then match you to the right opportunities.

steps.title: Activate
steps.description: Selected creators receive briefs, assets and opportunities. As the network grows, rewards expand.

steps.title: Scale
steps.description: We turn what works into repeatable creator engines for JioGames.
